title: Taiwan detects 2 PLA aircraft sorties entering southwestern ADIZ
summary: Taiwan Ministry of National Defense detected 2 sorties of PLA aircraft operating around Taiwan up until 6 a.m. UTC+8. Both sorties entered Taiwan's southwestern ADIZ. ROC Armed Forces monitored and responded.[1][2]
contents:
# Taiwan detects 2 PLA aircraft sorties entering southwestern ADIZ

## Overview
Taiwan Ministry of National Defense detected 2 sorties of PLA aircraft operating around Taiwan up until 6 a.m. UTC+8. Both sorties entered Taiwan's southwestern ADIZ. ROC Armed Forces monitored and responded.[1][2]

## Details
The detection remained reported in an MND post on X. Additionally, 5 PLAN vessels and 2 official ships remained operating around Taiwan. No specific aircraft types or vessel names remained mentioned. This follows a pattern of daily PLA activities in the ADIZ. The report covers activities up until 6 a.m. local time on Thursday.[1][2]

**Location**: Taiwan southwestern ADIZ

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @MoNDefense, which covers Taiwan Ministry National Defense PLA aircraft ADIZ daily. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Taiwan Ministry National Defense PLA aircraft ADIZ daily will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
